accountSelect.title: How would you like to continue?
accountSelect.lead: Choose the path that fits you. You can sign in or create a new account on the next step.

candidate.title: I'm looking for a job
candidate.body: Find roles, track applications, and access MHA career support.

employer.title: I'm hiring talent
employer.body: Publish vacancies, review applicants, and use MHA hiring support.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.lead: Use your email and password to continue.
signIn.shellNote: Sign-in is not connected yet. Authentication arrives in Phase 2.

register.title: Join MHA Jobs
register.lead: Choose how you'll use the platform to get the right onboarding.

candidate.title: Candidate account
candidate.body: Apply to roles and track your progress.

candidateRegister.title: Create your candidate account
candidateRegister.lead: We ask only for what each step needs. You can refine your profile later.

fields.passwordHint: At least 10 characters, with a mix of letters and numbers.
fields.preferredLocationHint: Optional — helps us match you to nearby roles.
fields.resumeHint: PDF or DOCX, up to 5 MB. Required before your first application.

ready.title: You're ready to go
ready.body: Your account shell is set up. Explore roles picked around your preferences.

candidateRegister.shellNote: This stepper is a layout preview. Submission is wired up in Phase 2.

employerRegister.title: Register your organisation
employerRegister.lead: Submit your company details for MHA review. You can publish roles once approved.

fields.passwordHint: At least 10 characters, with a mix of letters and numbers.

approval.title: What happens next
approval.step4: You see the result after you sign in.

employerRegister.shellNote: This form is a layout preview. Submission and approval are wired up in Phases 2–3.
